/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/linalg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/smoother.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/eigensolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/solvers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/coarse_op.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/multigrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/hmc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schwinger.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o schwinger  -lm /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
